L2().details: Sets up the L2 contracts. Depends on `L1()` being called first.

callPortalAndExpectRevert().details: Asserts that the reentrant call will revert.

disableUpgradedFork().details: Disables upgrade mode for testing. By default the fork testing env will be upgraded to the latest      implementation. This can be used to disable the upgrade which, is useful for tests targeting the upgrade      process itself.

enableAltDA().details: Enables alternative data availability mode for testing

returnIfForkTest(string).details: Returns early when running against a forked production network. Useful for allowing a portion of a test      to run.

setUp().details: Setup the system for a ready-to-use state.

skipIfCoverage().details: Skips tests when running in coverage mode.

skipIfForkTest(string).details: Skips tests when running against a forked production network.

skipIfOpsRepoTest(string).details: Skips tests when running against a forked production network using the superchain ops repo.

testFuzz_blacklist_guardian_succeeds(add.details: Tests that the guardian role can blacklist any dispute game.

testFuzz_blacklist_onlyGuardian_reverts(.details: Tests that `blacklistDisputeGame` reverts when called by a non-guardian.

testFuzz_proveWithdrawalTransaction_crea.details: Tests that `proveWithdrawalTransaction` succeeds if the game was created after the      game retirement timestamp.
Tests that `proveWithdrawalTransaction` reverts if the game was created before or at      the game retirement timestamp.

testFuzz_setRespectedGameType_guardianCa.details: Tests that the guardian can set the `respectedGameTypeUpdatedAt` timestamp to current timestamp.
Tests that the guardian role can set the respected game type to anything they want.

testFuzz_setRespectedGameType_onlyGuardi.details: Tests that `setRespectedGameType` reverts when called by a non-guardian.

test_finalizeWithdrawalTransaction_black.details: Tests that `finalizeWithdrawalTransaction` reverts if the withdrawal's dispute game has been blacklisted.

test_finalizeWithdrawalTransaction_delay.details: Tests an e2e prove -> finalize path, checking the edges of each delay for correctness.

test_finalizeWithdrawalTransaction_gameI.details: Tests that `finalizeWithdrawalTransaction` reverts if the withdrawal's dispute game is still in the air      gap.

test_finalizeWithdrawalTransaction_gameO.details: Tests that `finalizeWithdrawalTransaction` reverts if the respected game type was updated after the      dispute game was created.

test_finalizeWithdrawalTransaction_gameW.details: Tests that `finalizeWithdrawalTransaction` reverts if the game was not the respected game type when it was created. `proveWithdrawalTransaction` should already prevent this, but we remove that assumption here.

test_finalizeWithdrawalTransaction_ifDis.details: Tests that `finalizeWithdrawalTransaction` reverts if the dispute game has not resolved in favor of the      root claim.

test_finalizeWithdrawalTransaction_ifWit.details: Tests that `finalizeWithdrawalTransaction` reverts if the withdrawal has not been
Tests that `finalizeWithdrawalTransaction` reverts if the withdrawal has not been      proven long enough ago.

test_finalizeWithdrawalTransaction_legac.details: Tests that `finalizeWithdrawalTransaction` reverts if the game is a legacy game that does not implement      `wasRespectedGameTypeWhenCreated`.  `proveWithdrawalTransaction` should already prevent this, but we remove      that assumption here.

test_finalizeWithdrawalTransaction_noTxD.details: Tests that `finalizeWithdrawalTransaction` succeeds when _tx.data is empty.

test_finalizeWithdrawalTransaction_onIns.details: Tests that `finalizeWithdrawalTransaction` reverts if the withdrawal transaction      does not have enough gas to execute.

test_finalizeWithdrawalTransaction_onRee.details: Tests that `finalizeWithdrawalTransaction` reverts if a sub-call attempts to finalize      another withdrawal.

test_finalizeWithdrawalTransaction_onRep.details: Tests that `finalizeWithdrawalTransaction` reverts if the withdrawal has already been      finalized.

test_finalizeWithdrawalTransaction_pause.details: Tests that `finalizeWithdrawalTransaction` reverts if the contract is paused.

test_finalizeWithdrawalTransaction_secon.details: Tests that `finalizeWithdrawalTransaction` reverts when attempting to replay using a secondary proof      submitter.
Tests that `finalizeWithdrawalTransaction` succeeds using a different proof than an earlier one by another      party.

test_finalizeWithdrawalTransaction_targe.details: Tests that `finalizeWithdrawalTransaction` reverts if the target reverts and caller is the ESTIMATION_ADDRESS.
Tests that `finalizeWithdrawalTransaction` reverts if the target reverts.

test_finalizeWithdrawalTransaction_times.details: Tests that `finalizeWithdrawalTransaction` reverts if the provenWithdrawal's timestamp      is less than the dispute game's creation timestamp.

test_finalizeWithdrawalTransaction_wasRe.details: Tests that `finalizeWithdrawalTransaction` succeeds even if the respected game type is changed.

test_proveWithdrawalTransaction_badGameT.details: Tests that `proveWithdrawalTransaction` reverts if the dispute game being proven against is not of the      respected game type.

test_proveWithdrawalTransaction_legacyGa.details: Tests that `proveWithdrawalTransaction` reverts if the game is a legacy game that does not implement      `wasRespectedGameTypeWhenCreated`.

test_proveWithdrawalTransaction_onInvali.details: Tests that `proveWithdrawalTransaction` reverts when the outputRootProof does not match the output root
Tests that `proveWithdrawalTransaction` reverts when the withdrawal is missing.

test_proveWithdrawalTransaction_onSelfCa.details: Tests that `proveWithdrawalTransaction` reverts when the target is the portal contract.

test_proveWithdrawalTransaction_replayPr.details: Tests that `proveWithdrawalTransaction` can be re-executed if the dispute game proven against has resolved      against the favor of the root claim.
Tests that `proveWithdrawalTransaction` can be re-executed if the dispute game proven against has been      blacklisted.
Tests that `proveWithdrawalTransaction` reverts when the withdrawal has already been proven, and the new      game has the `CHALLENGER_WINS` status.

test_proveWithdrawalTransaction_replayRe.details: Tests that `proveWithdrawalTransaction` can be re-executed if the dispute game proven against is no longer      of the respected game type.

test_proveWithdrawalTransaction_wasNotRe.details: Tests that `proveWithdrawalTransaction` reverts if the game was not the respected game type when created.

artifacts().notice: The address of the Artifacts contract. Set into state by Deployer.setUp() with `etch` to avoid         mutating any nonces. MUST not have constructor logic.

isForkTest().notice: Indicates whether a test is running against a forked production network.
